description: Base 4wind: wind>=4, lane4 ST diff<=-0.05, lane4 exhibition rank<=3.
Base 4wind plus exclude wave 5-6cm when wind is in 3-4 bucket. Under base rule this is effectively wave 5-6cm with wind=4.
